message:
refactor(tutorial): enhance Step 8 with structured checklist groups and TutorialCheckpoint

- Restructures checklist into logical groups (Hypotheses, Tests, Assumptions, Critique)
- Adds explicit fixHint for each check item
- Adds revision prompt template for requesting agent fixes
- Integrates TutorialCheckpoint component for completion summary
- Adds links to session creation pages
